title: Poached British Butter Sun-Dried Tomato
description: This buttery and creamy dish features poached sun-dried tomatoes that are perfect for a cozy, raw-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 15 oz can of sun-dried tomatoes, drained and chopped
2 tbsp fresh basil leaves, finely chopped

instructions: Pour the water into a pot and bring it to a boil.
Add the softened butter to the boiling water and let it melt gently.
Gently lower the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, minced garlic, and finely chopped basil leaves into the hot water.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the tomatoes are soft and the liquid has reduced slightly.
Season with salt to taste and serve immediately.
